title: Realistic Stamina - Extended
description: An extended version of sparkierkan7's Realistic Stamina mod with additional features and improvements.
body:
# Realistic Stamina - Extended

An enhanced version of [sparkierkan7's Realistic Stamina mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-stamina) that adds a comprehensive stamina system to Minecraft.

## Key Features

### Core Mechanics
- Dynamic Stamina System - Manage your energy while running, swimming, and jumping
- In-Game Configuration - Full settings menu via Mod Menu
- Optimized Regeneration - Smooth stamina recovery

### Stamina Effects
- Speed Multiplier - Sprint faster as stamina increases
- Mining Fatigue - Realistic fatigue from overexertion
- Energy Drinks - Quick stamina restoration

### Customization
- HUD Styles - Choose between DETAILED or MINIMAL display
- Adjustable Scaling - Customize HUD size
- Fully Configurable - Tweak every aspect of the system

### Progression
- Fitness System - Increase max stamina through activity
- Mining Rewards - Gain stamina by mining blocks

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader 0.14.21+
- Fabric API
- CompleteConfig 2.4.0+
